title: GPT-3: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners

defines.name: GPT-3
defines.definition: An autoregressive language model with 175 billion parameters that performs a wide range of NLP tasks in a few-shot setting without gradient updates or task-specific fine-tuning.

problem: Current NLP systems typically require large task-specific fine-tuning datasets and still struggle to perform new language tasks from only a few examples or simple instructions.
